# CodeVetter

> Desktop-first AI code review workbench for agent-generated code. Local SQLite, Tauri shell, evidence-backed review — your repo never hits a central server.

## Product

- [Home](https://codevetter.com/): Features, pricing, how it works
- [Download](https://codevetter.com/download): macOS release
- [Privacy](https://codevetter.com/privacy): Local-first data handling

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://codevetter.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://codevetter.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://codevetter.com/llms.txt)

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Codevetter/codevetter#readme): Architecture, desktop app setup, and product direction
- [Releases](https://github.com/Codevetter/codevetter/releases): Changelog and binaries

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
